title: Me to You Tatty Teddy Plush 10cm-High Thank You Bear - Official Collection, Grey
features: CUTE THANK YOU TATTY TEDDY - show your gratitude to someone special who's gone the extra mile; whether you're buying for a friend, neighbour, teacher, colleague or family member, this gorgeous bear will let them know just how much they're appreciated

SOFT FABRIC AND EMBROIDERED DETAIL - Tatty Teddy's grey fur is super soft and fluffy; the padded cream heart is made from luxurious faux fur with pink piping, a pink satin bow and gold embroidered 'Thank You' text

BEAR SITS 10CM HIGH - suitable for children over 3 as well as teenagers or adults, this sweet little bear is just the right size to display on a shelf, desk or bedside table - or pop Tatty Teddy into a bag ready for a comforting cuddle whenever you need one!
HAND FINISHED FOR PREMIUM QUALITY - every Tatty Teddy plush bear is made with love, care and meticulous attention to detail to be treasured for a lifetime

GENUINE TATTY TEDDY by ME TO YOU – unique and instantly recognisable with grey fur, a cute blue nose and patches, Tatty Teddy has captured millions of hearts all over the world with a timeless message of love, happiness and friendship
description: Product Description Say thank you with this adorable Tatty Teddy from the latest Me to You plush collection. This beautifully soft and fluffy plush bear sits just 10cm high and would make the perfect gift for someone who deserves a thank you gesture they're sure to treasure. Tatty Teddy is holding a padded cream heart crafted from luxurious faux fur with pink piping, a pink ribbon, and the words 'Thank You' embroidered in gold. This sweet Tatty Teddy is a lovely way to show your gratitude to someone special who has gone the extra mile, whether that's a best friend, neighbour, teacher, colleague or family member. Made with love, care and meticulous attention to detail, all Me to You plush bears are hand finished for premium quality to be cherished for years to come. Safety Warning Keep away from fire
